long_description:
Affected support: On-Site Personnel Coverage / DCOPS Supported Services
Location: LON06
Please note the LON06 Data Center will be unstaffed between the hours of 16:00 & 19:00 GMT, 3rd of December 2025. During this time we will not be able to respond to on-site requests and/or troubleshooting. In the event of potential power or cooling events identified through monitoring, or SEV1 & SEV2 customer related tickets and cases please use the Data Center escalation points per https://confluence.softlayer.local/display/DCOps/DCO+Emergency+Contact+List
short_description: Onsite Resource Availability - Team Coverage Unavailable (Evening) - LON06
